# Sasan Perfumes

Sasan Perfumes is a UAE fragrance store offering perfumes, hair mist, all over sprays, and gift-ready scent collections online.

## Website

- Homepage: https://store.sasanperfumes.com
- English: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en
- Arabic: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/ar
- Shop: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/shop
- Contact: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/contact

## Product Categories

- Perfumes: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/category/perfumes
- All Over Spray: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/category/all-over-spray
- Hair Mist: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/category/sasan-hair-mist
- Gift Sets: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/category/gift-set

## Services

- Private labeling: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/private-labeling
- Services: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/services

## Customer Support

- WhatsApp: 0567394314
- Complaints & Calls: 0563982953
- Shipping: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/shipping
- Returns: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/returns
- Privacy: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/privacy
- Terms: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/en/terms-and-conditions

## Arabic

ساسان للعطور متجر عطور في الإمارات يقدم العطور، معطرات الشعر، بخاخات الجسم، ومجموعات الهدايا العطرية عبر الإنترنت.

- المتجر: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/ar/shop
- تواصل معنا: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/ar/contact
- التصنيع الخاص: https://store.sasanperfumes.com/ar/private-labeling
